case_title: EDSON VEIZAGA VS. JESSICA N. GODINEZ RAMIREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $140. SERVED JUN-07-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JESSICA N. GODINEZ
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY VEIZAGA, EDSON RAMIREZ, JESSICA N. GODINEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM AMANDA FISCHER. PLAINTIFF EDSON VEIZAGA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JESSICA N. GODINEZ RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA RAMIREZ REQUESTS THE COURT TO PROVIDE SPANISH INTERPRETER AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER JOHANNA VALLE (#376919). NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT MARIA RAMIREZ. DEFENDANT MARIA RAMIREZ DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF ORALLY STATED TO DISMISS DEFENDANT MARIA RAMIREZ AS A NAMED DEFENDANT TO MOVE FORWARD TO TRIAL WITH ONLY DEFENDANT JESSICA N. GODINEZ RAMIREZ WITH MARIA RAMIREZ (MOTHER) NOW APPEARING AS A WITNESS. DEFENDANT JESSICA RAMIREZ REQUESTS TO RESERVE SPANISH INTERPRETER JOHANNA VALLE TO ASSIST HER IF NEEDED AND FOR HER WITNESS. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AMANDA FISCHER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VEIZAGA, EDSON AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JESSICA N. GODINEZ RAMIREZ, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VEIZAGA, EDSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JESSICA N. GODINEZ $6,881.39 PRINCIPAL, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,096.39 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
